summary: Recipe correctly proves both back-navigation scenarios: market list → detail → back, and home → detail → back. All 21 nodes pass. All ACs are PROVEN with visual evidence.

checks.reason: 2/2 ACs covered by dedicated ac<N>-prefixed nodes with assertions and screenshots.
All AC nodes use ac<N>-* prefix. Setup nodes use setup-* and gate-* prefixes.
AC1 asserts market-list-view testID present. AC2 asserts account-menu-icon present and detail page absent. Both use strict eq operator.
Evidence screenshots captured for both ACs at the post-navigation moment. Screenshots are visually conclusive.
No switch defaults routing around ACs, no wait > 500ms, no DOM-only assertions for visual claims, no UNTESTABLE markers.
Uses perps/navigate-perps-tab and perps/navigate-to-market-detail flows via call. Raw steps only for the specific back-button assertion.

better_version_guidance: A stronger version could also verify the scroll position is preserved (requires custom CDP scrollHeight comparison before/after). Current recipe proves the route destination which is the primary AC.
